creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
Sorry, I didn't really have time to finish the version, but I might be able to bring back the port at some point in the future.

One problem I have is that the package builders think the build has failed, when it is completely normal for the build to take 2+ hours, often without any output on the terminal for a long time.

If all that is needed is a version that has no pkg plist errors, I can resolve that, but getting it to echo periodically to avoid confusing the build servers is a tougher issue to solve.

Tim
